title: Cadence Digital and Custom/Analog Design Flows Achieve the Latest TSMC N2 Certification
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CDNS) today announced its digital and custom/analog flows have achieved certification for TSMC's latest N2 Design Rule Manual (DRM). Through this latest collaboration, the companies delivered new N2 process design kits (PDKs) to make it easy for customers to leverage the latest technologies from both companies, including Cadence® AI technologies that improve designer productivity. Mutual customers are already designing inn.

title: Cadence Expands Support for 3Dblox 2.0 Standard with New System Prototyping Flows
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CDNS) today announced the availability of new system prototyping flows based on the Cadence® Integrity™ 3D-IC Platform that support the 3Dblox 2.0 standard. The Integrity 3D-IC Platform is fully compliant with the 3Dblox 2.0 standard language extensions, and the flows have been optimized for all of TSMC's latest 3DFabric™ offerings, including Integrated Fan-Out (InFO), Chip-on-Wafer-on-Substrate (CoWoS®) and System-on-Inte.

title: Cadence (CDNS) & TMSC Collaborate to Enhance RFIC Design
text: Cadence (CDNS) collaborates with TSMC to help customers streamline the integration of critical RF functionality into designs.

title: Cadence (CDNS) Expands Portfolio Through Intrinsix Acquisition
text: Cadence (CDNS) is set to acquire Intrinsix to further enhance its system and IC design services.

title: Cadence Advances Hyperscale SoC Design with Expanded IP Portfolio for TSMC N3E Process Featuring Next-Generation 224G-LR SerDes IP
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CDNS--Cadence expanded its design IP portfolio on TSMC's 3nm (N3E) process, which now includes the 224G Long-Reach SerDes PHY IP for hyperscale SoC design.

title: Cadence to Acquire Intrinsix Corporation from CEVA
text: Transaction will bring Cadence a highly skilled team of engineers to expand company's reach in the aerospace and defense industry, and strengthen CEVA's focus on IP for high-growth technologies addressing wireless communications, sensing and edge AI SAN JOSE, Calif. and ROCKVILLE, Md.

title: Cadence (CDNS) Unveils NPU to Enhance Edge AI Performance
text: Cadence (CDNS) introduces NPU and SDK to accelerate AI development and reduce energy costs.

title: Cadence Accelerates On-Device and Edge AI Performance and Efficiency with New Neo NPU IP and NeuroWeave SDK for Silicon Design
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CDNS--The new Cadence Neo NPUs and NeuroWeave software development kit for silicon designers address escalating demand for on-device and edge AI processing.

title: Cadence (CDNS) Introduces New AI-Powered OrCAD X Platform
text: Cadence notes that OrCAD X platform is capable of reducing design turnaround time by 5X owing to its cloud scalability and AI-powered placement automation technology.

title: Cadence (CDNS) Gains From Healthy Consumer Demand Trends
text: Cadence's (CDNS) performance is being driven by solid customer demand for its diversified product portfolio. Frequent product launches and strategic collaborations are tailwinds.

title: Cadence (CDNS) & Arm Partner to Improve Design Efficiency
text: Cadence (CDNS) collaborates with Arm to address the growing needs of complex workloads and help customers achieve PPA goals.
